name: Airbnb
philosophy: A warm, generous consumer marketplace anchored on a clean white canvas and Airbnb Rausch (#ff385c), the single brand voltage that carries every primary CTA, search-button orb, and rating dot.
trademark_signals: Custom variable type: Airbnb Cereal VF. Display weights sit at 500–700, body at 400. Modest weight is intentional
Three-product top nav: Homes, Experiences, Services
Pill-shaped global search bar: white surface
Property cards are photo-first: aspect-ratio rectangles with corner clipping
